info.title: Layer REST API
info.description:
REST API for AI-powered game asset creation on the Layer platform.

## Authentication

All endpoints require a Bearer token in the `Authorization` header:

```
Authorization: Bearer <token>
```

### Personal Access Tokens (recommended)

The simplest way to authenticate is with a Personal Access Token (PAT):

1. Log in to [app.layer.ai](https://app.layer.ai)
2. Go to **Settings > Personal Access Tokens**
3. Click **Create Token**, give it a name, and copy the token value
4. Pass it as `Authorization: Bearer <your-pat-token>`

PATs are long-lived and ideal for scripts, CI pipelines, and partner integrations.

### OAuth2 (browser-based)

For browser-based applications, use the Auth0 OAuth2 flow. Redirect users to
the Layer login page, exchange the authorization code for a JWT access token,
and use it as `Authorization: Bearer <jwt>`.

## Creative Units

Generations consume Creative Units (CUs). Use the estimate endpoints to check
cost before executing. Check workspace balance via `GET /v1/workspaces/{id}`.

## Pagination

List endpoints support cursor-based pagination via `limit` and `cursor` query
parameters. Responses include a `pagination` object with `next_cursor`,
`has_more_results`, and `total_count`. Cursors are opaque — do not parse or
construct them.

## Errors

All errors return [RFC 7807 Problem Details](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7807):

```json
{
  "type": "https://api.layer.ai/errors/ERROR_CODE",
  "title": "Human-readable title",
  "status": 404,
  "detail": "Detailed description of what went wrong."
}
```

Common status codes: `401` (unauthenticated), `402` (insufficient balance),
`403` (forbidden), `404` (not found), `422` (invalid input), `429` (rate limited).

get.description: List all workspaces the authenticated user belongs to, with Creative Units balance details.

401.description: Unauthenticated — missing or invalid Bearer token.

429.description: Rate limited — too many concurrent requests.

get.description: Get details for a single workspace including Creative Units balance.

401.description: Unauthenticated — missing or invalid Bearer token.

429.description: Rate limited — too many concurrent requests.

get.description: List available AI models in a workspace with optional filtering by modality, capabilities, and text search.

401.description: Unauthenticated — missing or invalid Bearer token.

429.description: Rate limited — too many concurrent requests.

get.description: Get full details for a specific model including capabilities, timing, pricing, and prompt format.

401.description: Unauthenticated — missing or invalid Bearer token.

429.description: Rate limited — too many concurrent requests.

get.description: List available generation workflows (published blueprints) in a workspace.

401.description: Unauthenticated — missing or invalid Bearer token.

429.description: Rate limited — too many concurrent requests.

post.description: Estimate the Creative Units cost of running a workflow with given inputs.

401.description: Unauthenticated — missing or invalid Bearer token.

429.description: Rate limited — too many concurrent requests.

post.description: Start a workflow execution. Returns immediately with a run ID. Poll with GET /workflows/{workflow_id}/runs/{run_id} for results.

401.description: Unauthenticated — missing or invalid Bearer token.

429.description: Rate limited — too many concurrent requests.

get.description: Get the status and results of a workflow run.

401.description: Unauthenticated — missing or invalid Bearer token.

429.description: Rate limited — too many concurrent requests.

post.description: Estimate the Creative Units cost of an inference with given parameters.

401.description: Unauthenticated — missing or invalid Bearer token.

429.description: Rate limited — too many concurrent requests.

post.description: Start an AI inference (image, video, 3D, or audio). Returns immediately with an ID. Poll with GET /inferences/{id} for results.

401.description: Unauthenticated — missing or invalid Bearer token.

429.description: Rate limited — too many concurrent requests.

get.description: Get the status and results of an inference run.

401.description: Unauthenticated — missing or invalid Bearer token.

429.description: Rate limited — too many concurrent requests.

post.description: Upload an image, video, or audio file for use as input to generations. Send as multipart/form-data. Allowed types: audio/mpeg, audio/wav, image/jpeg, image/png, image/webp, video/mp4. Max size: 64 MB.

401.description: Unauthenticated — missing or invalid Bearer token.

429.description: Rate limited — too many concurrent requests.

BlueprintRunStatus.title: BlueprintRunStatus
BlueprintRunStatus.description: Enum representing the status of a blueprint run.

estimated_price_creative_units.title: Estimated Price Creative Units
estimated_price_creative_units.description: Total estimated Creative Units price for this run.

workspace_balance_creative_units.title: Workspace Balance Creative Units
workspace_balance_creative_units.description: Usable Creative Units balance (total balance minus reserved by in-progress generations).

estimated_remaining_balance_creative_uni.title: Estimated Remaining Balance Creative Units
estimated_remaining_balance_creative_uni.description: Usable balance after subtracting the estimated price. Can be negative.

has_sufficient_creative_units.title: Has Sufficient Creative Units
has_sufficient_creative_units.description: Whether the workspace has enough available Creative Units to cover the estimated price.

model_id.title: Model Id
model_id.description: Model/style ID to use for generation.

batch_size.title: Batch Size
batch_size.description: Number of outputs to estimate price for (1-16).

EstimateInferencePriceRequest.title: EstimateInferencePriceRequest
EstimateInferencePriceRequest.description: REST request body for estimating inference price. workspace_id comes from path.

estimated_price_creative_units.title: Estimated Price Creative Units
estimated_price_creative_units.description: Total estimated Creative Units price for this run.

output_counts.title: Output Counts
output_counts.description: Expected output count for each workflow output parameter.

workspace_balance_creative_units.title: Workspace Balance Creative Units
workspace_balance_creative_units.description: Usable Creative Units balance (total balance minus reserved by in-progress generations).

estimated_remaining_balance_creative_uni.title: Estimated Remaining Balance Creative Units
estimated_remaining_balance_creative_uni.description: Usable balance after subtracting the estimated price. Can be negative.

has_sufficient_creative_units.title: Has Sufficient Creative Units
has_sufficient_creative_units.description: Whether the workspace has enough available Creative Units to cover the estimated price.

inputs.title: Inputs
inputs.description: Workflow inputs matching the workflow's input schema.

inference_id.title: Inference Id
inference_id.description: Unique identifier for this forge run.

created_at.title: Created At
created_at.description: Timestamp of when the run was created.

session_id.title: Session Id
session_id.description: Session ID the run was added to, if session_name was provided.

model_id.title: Model Id
model_id.description: Model/style ID to use for generation.

prompt.title: Prompt
prompt.description: Text prompt describing what to generate.

quality.title: Quality
quality.description: Quality level: low, medium, or high.

fps.title: Fps
fps.description: FPS for LTX video generation (e.g. 25 or 50).

ExecuteInferenceRequest.title: ExecuteInferenceRequest
ExecuteInferenceRequest.description: REST request body for executing an inference. workspace_id comes from path.

run_id.title: Run Id
run_id.description: Unique identifier for this workflow run.

status.description: Current run status: PENDING or RUNNING.

created_at.title: Created At
created_at.description: Timestamp of when the run was created.

session_id.title: Session Id
session_id.description: Session ID the run was added to, if session_name was provided.

inputs.title: Inputs
inputs.description: Input values matching the workflow's input schema.

session_name.title: Session Name
session_name.description: Session name. Creates a new session if not found in the workspace.

file_id.title: File Id
file_id.description: File ID of an uploaded file.

type.title: Type
type.description: Guidance type: init, reference_image, pose, depth, canny, softedge_hed, segmentation, lineart, prompt (style reference), face, first_frame, last_frame, init_video, audio, init_mesh, texture_image, scribble, color_sketch, editing_reference. See model capabilities for supported types per model.

weight.title: Weight
weight.description: Influence weight (0-1). Defaults to 0.5 for init, 1 for others.

edge_radius.title: Edge Radius
edge_radius.description: Mask edge blur radius in pixels.

file_id.title: File Id
file_id.description: File ID for the generated asset.

content_type.title: Content Type
content_type.description: MIME type, e.g. image/png or video/mp4.

type.title: Type
type.description: Video effect type (UPPERCASE). Common types: GENERAL, ORBIT_360, DOLLY_IN, DOLLY_OUT, ZOOM_IN, ZOOM_OUT, CRANE_UP, CRANE_DOWN, TILT_UP, TILT_DOWN, STATIC, FPV_DRONE, HYPERLAPSE, HANDHELD. See model capabilities for supported effects per model.

inference_id.title: Inference Id
inference_id.description: Unique identifier for this forge run.

status.description: Current status: in_progress, complete, failed, cancelled, or deleted.

poll_interval_seconds.title: Poll Interval Seconds
poll_interval_seconds.description: Suggested polling interval in seconds. Present while IN_PROGRESS.

completed_at.title: Completed At
completed_at.description: Completion timestamp. Present only on COMPLETE.

outputs.title: Outputs
outputs.description: Generated assets. Present only on COMPLETE.

error.title: Error
error.description: Error message. Present only on FAILED.

run_id.title: Run Id
run_id.description: Unique identifier for this workflow run.

status.description: Current status: pending, running, success, failure, or cancelled.

poll_interval_seconds.title: Poll Interval Seconds
poll_interval_seconds.description: Suggested polling interval in seconds. Present while PENDING or RUNNING.

steps.title: Steps
steps.description: Status of each step composing the workflow run.

estimated_price_creative_units.title: Estimated Price Creative Units
estimated_price_creative_units.description: Estimated Creative Units price. Present when available.

completed_at.title: Completed At
completed_at.description: Completion timestamp. Present only on SUCCESS.

actual_price_creative_units.title: Actual Price Creative Units
actual_price_creative_units.description: Actual Creative Units price charged. Present only on SUCCESS.

outputs.title: Outputs
outputs.description: Generated assets. Present only on SUCCESS.

error.title: Error
error.description: Error message. Present only on FAILURE.

name.title: Name
name.description: The name of the workflow step

status.description: The execution status of the step: pending, running, success, failure, or cancelled.

workspaces.title: Workspaces
workspaces.description: All workspaces the authenticated user belongs to, ordered by most recently active first.

session_modes.title: Session Modes
session_modes.description: Supported modes: create, create_video, create_3_d, create_speech, create_sound_effect, prompt_edit_image, etc.

guidance_file_types.title: Guidance File Types
guidance_file_types.description: Supported reference image types: pose, depth, canny, lineart, prompt (style reference), init, reference_image, etc.

ModelCapabilitiesREST.title: ModelCapabilitiesREST
ModelCapabilitiesREST.description: ModelCapabilities without the MCP token-saving serializer — returns all fields.

model_id.title: Model Id
model_id.description: Unique model identifier — use for generation or to fetch full details.

base_model_id.title: Base Model Id
base_model_id.description: Base model identifier, e.g. flux_2_pro, kling_v3_pro

price_per_unit.title: Price Per Unit
price_per_unit.description: CU cost per measurement unit (see price_unit)

next_cursor.title: Next Cursor
next_cursor.description: Cursor to use to get the next page

has_more_results.title: Has More Results
has_more_results.description: If there are more results to page through

total_count.title: Total Count
total_count.description: Total number of results matching the query

file_id.title: File Id
file_id.description: Unique identifier for the uploaded file. Use as input to generation endpoints.

content_type.title: Content Type
content_type.description: MIME type of the uploaded file.

file_size_bytes.title: File Size Bytes
file_size_bytes.description: Size of the uploaded file in bytes.

name.title: Name
name.description: Input parameter name (used as key in execute_workflow inputs)

type.title: Type
type.description: Parameter type: string, number, boolean, file, prompt, etc.

value_schema.title: Value Schema
value_schema.description: JSON schema of the input value

required.title: Required
required.description: Whether this input must be provided

value_schema.title: Value Schema
value_schema.description: JSON schema of the output value

object_id.title: Object Id
object_id.description: Unique identifier of the generated object.

object_type.description: Type of generated object: file or asset.

file_id.title: File Id
file_id.description: File ID — pass directly as input to forge or workflow runs without re-uploading.

content_type.title: Content Type
content_type.description: MIME type, e.g. image/png or video/mp4.

duration_seconds.title: Duration Seconds
duration_seconds.description: Duration in seconds for video assets.

modality.description: Primary output modality: image, video, three_d, audio

created_at.title: Created At
created_at.description: When this workflow version was created

published_at.title: Published At
published_at.description: When this workflow version was published

slug.title: Slug
slug.description: The workspace slug (its representation in the app URL).

balance_creative_units.title: Balance Creative Units
balance_creative_units.description: Total Creative Units balance before reservations.

reserved_creative_units.title: Reserved Creative Units
reserved_creative_units.description: Creative Units reserved by in-progress generations.

available_creative_units.title: Available Creative Units
available_creative_units.description: Usable balance (balance minus reserved). Can be negative.

last_active_at.title: Last Active At
last_active_at.description: When the current user was last active in this workspace.

HTTPBearer.description: Personal Access Token or OAuth2 JWT. Create a PAT at app.layer.ai → Settings → Personal Access Tokens.
